name: ScienceSwarm Brown Bag
description: Stress-test an early research idea into a durable written brief with a sharper research question, landscape/novelty pass, decisive test, hard-objection map, publication fit, publication roadmap, review loop, and next research assignment.
summary: A rigorous brown-bag partner for scientists, mathematicians, social scientists, and engineers: turn a rough research idea into a saved and reviewed Research Brown Bag Brief with landscape/novelty synthesis, premises, objections, alternative framings, publication fit, publication pathway, and the smallest decisive next test.
